zh.lifeSummary: 當Ralph Neville於1291年出生在英國達勒姆斯泰德洛普時，他的父親Ralph Neville29歲，母親Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering25歲。他於1326年1月14日與Alice de Audley在英國達勒姆達勒姆結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和6個女兒的父母。他去世於1367年在英國英格蘭達勒姆拉比享年76歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Ralph Neville于1291年出生在英国達勒姆斯泰德洛普时，他的父亲Ralph Neville29岁，母亲Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering25岁。他于1326年1月14日与Alice de Audley在英国達勒姆達勒姆结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和6个女儿的父母。他去世于1367年在英国英格兰達勒姆拉比享年76岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆達勒姆 凱德拉爾。

nameMeanings.name: Neville
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English and Irish (of Norman origin): habitational name from Neuville in Calvados or Néville in Seine-Maritime, both so called from Old French neu(f) ‘new’ (from Latin novus) + ville ‘settlement’. One family line, originally from Neuville (Calvados), became powerful during the Wars of the Roses through Richard Neville (1428–71), 16th Earl of Warwick, nicknamed "The Kingmaker".
Irish (Munster): assimilation of the Gaelic name Ó Niadh (see Nee ) and sometimes of Ó Cnaimhín (see Nevin ).

History: George Neville came to VA in or c. 1700 and settled on the headwaters of the Occoquan River, acquiring a large estate. His descendants, bearing the surnames Neville and Craig, were of considerable importance in Pittsburgh, PA, and Cincinnati, OH.

variants.name: Nevills
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Nevil
meanings: English (of Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Newill
meanings: English and Irish (or Norman origin): variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevill
meanings: English and Irish: of Norman origin, a variant of   Neville  .

variants.name: Nevels
meanings: English and Scottish (Wigtownshire): of Norman origin, a variant of Neville , with post-medieval excrescent -s. This surname is now rare in Britain.
Dutch and North German: unexplained.

variants.name: Nee
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Dermot, John Patrick.

Irish (Galway): shortened Anglicized form of Gaelic Ó Niadh ‘descendant of Nia’ or Mac Niadh ‘son of Nia’. Compare McNee . Needham 2 and Neville have also been adopted as Anglicized forms of this name.
North German: possibly a relationship name from Middle Low German neve ‘nephew, grand-child’.

nameMeanings.name: Ralph
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

variants.name: Ralf
meanings: From a Norman French name, Raulf, a contracted form of the Germanic personal name Radulf, derived from rād ‘counsel’ + wulf ‘wolf’. The spelling with -ph is due to classical influence in the 18th century.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Ralph Neville was born in 1291, in Staindrop, Durham, England, his father, Ralph Neville, was 29 and his mother, Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, was 25. He married Alice de Audley on 14 January 1326, in Durham, Durham, England. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 6 daughters. He died in 1367, in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 76, and was buried in Durham Cathedral, Durham, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Ralph Neville est né en 1291, à Staindrop, Durham, Angleterre, son père, Ralph Neville, avait 29 ans et sa mère, Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, avait 25 ans. Il a épousé Alice de Audley le 14 janvier 1326, à Durham, Durham, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 6 filles. Il est décédé en 1367, à Raby, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 76 ans, et a été enterré à Durham Cathedral, Durham, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Ralph Neville 1291 in Staindrop, Durham, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Ralph Neville 29 und seine Mutter Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering 25. Er hat am 14. Januar 1326 in Durham, Durham, England Alice de Audley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 6 Töchter. Er starb 1367 im Alter von 76 Jahren in Raby, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Durham Cathedral, Durham, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville è nato il nel 1291 nel Staindrop, Durham, England, il suo padre, Ralph Neville, aveva 29 anni e il suo madre, Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, aveva 25 anni. Lui sposato Alice de Audley il 14 gennaio 1326, nel Durham, Durham, England. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1367, nel Raby, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 76 anni, e fu sepolto a Durham Cathedral, Durham, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Ralph Nevilleが1291年にイギリスダルハムスティインドロップで生まれた時，父Ralph Nevilleは29歳，母Euphemia Fitzroger de Claveringは25歳であった。1326年1月14日にイギリスダルハムダルハムでAlice de Audleyと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼は1367年にイギリスイギリスダルハムラビーで76歳で死去し，イギリスダルハムダルハム カスエドラルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Ralph Neville(이)가 1291년 영국 뒤람 스테인드럽에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Ralph Neville(은)는 29세였고, 그의 어머니 Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering(은)는 25세였다. 그는 1326년 1월 14일 영국 뒤람 뒤람에서 Alice de Audley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1367년 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 라비에서 76세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 뒤람 캐테드럴에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Ralph Neville nasceu em 1291, em Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, seu pai, Ralph Neville, tinha 29 anos e sua mãe, Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, tinha 25 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice de Audley em 14 de janeiro de 1326, em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 6 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1367, em Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 76 anos, e foi sepultado em Durham Cathedral, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Ralph Neville родился в 1291 г. в местности стеиндроп, дурам, Англия, его отцу по имени Ralph Neville было 29 лет, а матери, которую звали Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, 25. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice de Audley 14 января 1326 г. в местности дурам, дурам, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 6 дочерей. Он умер в 1367 г. в местности раби, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 76 лет и был похоронен в местности дурам кэтедраль, дурам, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Ralph Neville nació en 1291, en Staindrop, Durham, Inglaterra, su papá, Ralph Neville, tenía 29 años y su mamá, Euphemia Fitzroger de Clavering, tenía 25 años. Se casó con Alice de Audley el 14 de enero de 1326, en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 6 hijas. Murió en 1367, en Raby, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 76 años, y fue sepultado en Durham Cathedral, Durham, Inglaterra.
